description_long: This is a stone sculpture of a robed human figure, likely a religious or historical figure, standing atop a tall, ornate pedestal. The figure holds an object close to its chest and is depicted with detailed drapery and flowing hair. The pedestal features decorative carvings and a multi-tiered base, giving the sculpture a sense of grandeur and permanence. The surface of the sculpture appears weathered, with some discoloration and patina, suggesting exposure to the elements. The overall form is vertical and imposing, with the figure elevated well above eye level. The sculpture is monochromatic, primarily in shades of gray, with subtle variations in tone due to aging and material texture.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed figure atop an ornate pedestal, featuring detailed carvings and a tall, imposing form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robed figure holding an object to its chest, with the full decorative pedestal visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the layered structure of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and the pedestal, with drapery details and no visible face.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the pedestal's side carvings.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure on a pedestal
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban or park setting.
